title: Casa Aurora
summary: Reposicionamento completo com nova linguagem visual e narrativa digital editorial.

chapters.title: Context
chapters.content: Casa Aurora required a new identity for a premium residential launch in a highly competitive local market. The previous communication lacked clarity and emotional distinction across channels.

chapters.title: Design response
chapters.content: We built a narrative-led direction anchored in warm material tones, calm rhythm and restrained typography. The system translated consistently from architecture collateral to digital launch assets.

chapters.title: Outcome
chapters.content: The repositioning increased project perception and improved consistency across touchpoints, allowing the sales and marketing teams to present a unified premium offer.

metrics.label: Lead conversion
metrics.description: Increase in qualified enquiry conversion after launch.

metrics.label: Campaign engagement
metrics.description: Improvement in average interaction time with digital content.

metrics.label: Delivery timeline
metrics.description: From strategy alignment to full rollout of core assets.

testimonial.quote: The team translated our vision into a coherent spatial and brand narrative with exceptional precision.
testimonial.author: Amelia Grant

title: Verde Studio
summary: Experiência de compra com foco em ritmo visual, produto e storytelling de coleção.

chapters.title: Challenge
chapters.content: Verde Studio needed to evolve from a catalogue-first online store to a brand-driven retail experience with stronger product storytelling and navigation clarity.

chapters.title: System
chapters.content: We designed a modular commerce framework with editorial chapters, product hierarchy rules and a refined interaction cadence to guide decision-making.

chapters.title: Impact
chapters.content: The new system improved both discoverability and conversion while preserving a high-end visual tone aligned with the brand’s positioning.

metrics.label: Average order value
metrics.description: Growth observed in first quarter post-launch.

metrics.label: Session depth
metrics.description: Users explored more collection pages per visit.

metrics.label: Checkout completion
metrics.description: Reduced drop-off across the purchase flow.

testimonial.quote: The new digital and retail language elevated both perception and sales performance in a very short cycle.
testimonial.author: Lucas Ferreira

title: Nero Atelier
summary: Sistema visual modular para campanhas e desdobramentos em canais digitais.

chapters.title: Brief
chapters.content: Nero Atelier requested a flexible visual system to support seasonal campaigns, social-first storytelling and launch moments with limited production overhead.

chapters.title: Approach
chapters.content: We created a component-based identity toolkit with scalable templates, motion principles and hierarchy rules to ensure consistency under rapid publishing cycles.

chapters.title: Progress
chapters.content: The system is currently being implemented across campaign channels, with phased rollout designed to minimize disruption while increasing creative control.

metrics.label: Asset production speed
metrics.description: Reduction in average creation time per campaign asset.

metrics.label: Template adoption
metrics.description: Share of content using the new modular framework.

metrics.label: Rollout stage
metrics.description: Active deployment across digital and social touchpoints.

testimonial.quote: We gained a scalable creative system without losing character, even under fast campaign timelines.
testimonial.author: Sofia Rinaldi

title: Lumen Spaces
summary: Direção de lançamento com foco em produto premium e microinterações minimalistas.

chapters.title: Opportunity
chapters.content: Lumen Spaces needed a launch framework that could communicate product quality while simplifying technical benefits for a broader commercial audience.

chapters.title: Direction
chapters.content: We developed a campaign and product narrative centred on tactile material cues, concise messaging and measured microinteraction patterns.

chapters.title: Result
chapters.content: The launch established a clear premium positioning and improved engagement across sales channels, especially in early product comparisons.

metrics.label: Product page engagement
metrics.description: Increase in time spent on detailed product sections.

metrics.label: Qualified leads
metrics.description: Growth in enquiries matching target project profiles.

metrics.label: Launch timeline
metrics.description: Complete campaign direction delivered inside launch window.

testimonial.quote: The launch framework gave us clarity, confidence and stronger traction with our target audience.
testimonial.author: Mia Turner
